summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CleverBakes Analytics Dashboard and Voucher System features. Backend APIs fully functional with 98% success rate. Frontend displays Analytics tab with stat cards, charts, and breakdowns. Vouchers tab shows CRUD functionality. Order modal voucher integration working perfectly with discount calculation and order submission.

minor_bugs.issue: Bestseller toggle endpoint doesn't properly reject unauthorized requests
minor_bugs.impact: Security concern - should return 401 for non-authenticated requests

passed_tests: Admin authentication (admin/cleverbakes2025)
GET /api/analytics returns complete analytics data with all required fields
Analytics stat cards display (revenue, orders, avg order, paid, pending, products)
Analytics revenue chart with proper data visualization
Analytics top products chart with order counts and revenue
Analytics status breakdown and payment method breakdown
Analytics category breakdown showing products per category
GET /api/vouchers returns 2 seeded vouchers (WELCOME10, SAVE50)
POST /api/vouchers creates new voucher with proper validation
PUT /api/vouchers/{id} updates voucher successfully
DELETE /api/vouchers/{id} deletes voucher successfully
POST /api/vouchers/validate with WELCOME10 and subtotal 1000 returns discount 100
POST /api/vouchers/validate with invalid code returns 404
POST /api/vouchers/validate with insufficient subtotal returns 400
Admin dashboard Analytics tab displays all stat cards and charts
Admin dashboard Vouchers tab shows voucher list with seeded vouchers
Admin can create new voucher (TEST20 created successfully)
Admin voucher form validation and submission working
Order modal has voucher code input field with apply/remove functionality
Apply voucher WELCOME10 shows discount in order total
Invalid voucher code shows proper error message
Order submission with voucher code applies discount correctly
Order success shows voucher savings message
Order tracking number generated and displayed
Products, categories, orders, reviews tabs still functional
Bestseller toggle functionality still working
All existing CRUD operations working
Frontend-backend integration for voucher validation and order processing
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix authorization check in PUT /api/products/{id}/bestseller endpoint to properly reject unauthorized requests (should return 401 status code). This is the same minor security issue from previous iteration.

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all Analytics and Voucher features working perfectly)
